Short Description: Slow-braised beef chuck with pearl onions, cremini mushrooms, and a red wine reduction. Whipped Yukon Gold purée. Roasted carrots.
Long Description: Slow-braised beef chuck with pearl onions and cremini mushrooms in a red wine reduction. Served over whipped Yukon Gold purée with roasted carrots, for a rich, rustic French stew with a deeply savory finish.

Short Description: Shio-koji-cured chicken thigh with a stone-fruit gastrique. Wild rice. Roasted golden beets and lacinato kale.
Long Description: Chicken thigh cured 24 hours in shio-koji — a traditional Japanese paste of rice fermented with koji culture — for unmatched tenderness and deep umami. Served over wild rice with roasted golden beets and sautéed lacinato kale. Finished with our stone-fruit gastrique, a bright, tangy-sweet French-style sauce made by reducing sherry vinegar, honey, and seasonal stone fruit purée.

Dish Name: Mediterranean Chickpea Chicken Bowl with Green Tahini
Short Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over a dairy-free green tahini bed. Roasted chickpeas, Brussels sprouts, pickled red onions.
Long Description: Pan-seared chicken breast layered over a bed of our dairy-free green tahini — a vibrant, herb-packed sauce blended with parsley, dill, mint, garlic, lemon, and EVOO. Served with roasted chickpeas, roasted Brussels sprouts, and bright pickled red onions, for a fresh, herbaceous Mediterranean bowl with a tangy finish.

Dish Name: Coffee-Crusted Bavette Steak with Bone Marrow Butter
Short Description: Espresso-and-smoked-paprika-crusted bavette steak with a bone marrow butter. Toasted brown rice. Charred green beans and corn.
Long Description: Bavette steak rubbed with an espresso-and-smoked-paprika crust — the espresso deepens the crust's bold, savory richness without any sweetness. Seared and sliced, served over toasted brown rice with charred green beans and charred corn. Finished with a dollop of our bone marrow butter, European butter whipped with shallots, garlic, and fresh herbs.

Short Description: Salmon marinated in pomegranate molasses, sumac, and Aleppo pepper. Saffron cauliflower rice. Roasted zucchini.
Long Description: Salmon marinated in pomegranate molasses, sumac, and Aleppo pepper, then gently roasted. Served over saffron cauliflower rice with roasted zucchini. Finished with our whipped pomegranate sauce, for a bright, tart-sweet seafood plate with a complex, Middle Eastern finish.

Short Description: Shrimp marinated in lemongrass and Thai red curry. Jasmine rice. Roasted bell peppers and broccoli.
Long Description: Shrimp marinated in lemongrass and Thai red curry, then seared. Served over jasmine rice with roasted bell peppers and broccoli. Finished with our thick Thai red curry sauce, for a fragrant, deeply spiced bowl with a creamy, aromatic finish.

Short Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over rigatoni in a sun-dried tomato cream sauce.
Long Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over rigatoni in a sun-dried tomato cream sauce with garlic, Parmigiano, Italian herbs, and a hint of red pepper, for a rich, indulgent Italian-American pasta with a deeply savory finish.

Short Description: Lemongrass-marinated tempeh over brown jasmine rice with pickled carrots, cucumber ribbons, and fresh cilantro. Tahini-sriracha drizzle.
Long Description: Smoky lemongrass-marinated tempeh over brown jasmine rice with quick-pickled carrots, cucumber ribbons, and fresh cilantro. Tahini-sriracha drizzle on the side, for a bright, savory Vietnamese-inspired bowl with a smoky, umami finish.

Short Description: A creamy mango chia pudding layered with coconut cream and topped with fresh mango.
Long Description: A creamy mango chia pudding layered with coconut cream and topped with fresh mango.

Short Description: Chia pudding steeped in Earl Grey tea with macerated strawberries and house granola.
Long Description: Chia pudding steeped in Earl Grey tea for a bright bergamot note, layered with fresh-macerated strawberries and our house almond-coconut granola.

Short Description: Anti-inflammatory turmeric bone broth with ginger, black pepper, and warming spices.
Long Description: Our anti-inflammatory turmeric bone broth with ginger, black pepper, and warming spices.

Short Description: Clarified lemon ginger bone broth with sea salt, white pepper, and fresh herbs. Designed for daily sipping, warm or chilled.
Long Description: Our lightest bone broth yet. A clarified lemon ginger bone broth with sea salt, white pepper, and fresh herbs, designed for daily sipping, warm or chilled.
